cli.discovery: Read cliPath and versionCommand from the local Codex Praetor configuration; never commit a machine-specific path.

mappings.provider_semantics: Read, Grep and Glob only for a bounded local audit.
Edit and shell tools only inside the disposable worker worktree.

lifecycle.launch: invoke-codex-praetor.ps1 builds the supervised CLI command and writes immutable job metadata before launch.
lifecycle.parse_terminal_state: watch-codex-praetor-job.ps1 records process state, normalized failure class and evidence state.
lifecycle.cleanup: The watcher closes the job lifecycle; retained worktrees are reclaimed only by the controlled cleanup path.

evidence.end_to_end: A current-generation provider canary in an isolated worktree is required before real dispatch.
